text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai, and the crowd is
excited to see Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket becomes anxious about living up
to her fans' expectations and racing against
Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she gets herself pumped to race against
her rival and run a great race.
